description.ko: 무중력 환경에서 생체 발광 녹색과 황금빛을 사용하여 유기적인 신경 흐름을 리드미컬하게 시각화한 작품입니다.
description.en: A rhythmic visualization of organic neural flow using bioluminescent greens and golden light in a weightless environment.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Cerebral Tide.' A complex, undulating neural network composed of #7FB069 emerald membranes and #2D5A3D deep forest vascular filaments. The entity pulses like a bioluminescent lung within a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid atmosphere. Strands of #FFE66D golden liquid light flow through translucent capillary paths, creating rhythmic ripples. Rendered in Octane, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, macro focus on cellular permeability to capture a divine, breathing organic flow.
